# Andreas Hatlem

> Product builder shipping for the web since 1999.

Andreas Hatlem is a product builder and founder based in Oslo, Norway. He has been building web products since 1999, spanning startups, SaaS platforms, and enterprise software.

## About

- Based in Oslo, Norway (59°54'N 10°45'E)
- Founder of Getia AS, a Norwegian software company building a portfolio of SaaS products
- 25+ years of experience building for the web
- Focus areas: SaaS, product development, AI-powered tools

## Current Work

Andreas runs Getia AS, which builds and operates multiple SaaS products including:
- Lakehouse42 — Enterprise knowledge platform
- SkyDrover — Drone operations management
- GetMailer — Email marketing
- GetChannel — Multi-channel communication
- FaceShot — AI-powered headshot generation
- And many more at https://getia.no

This site is available in Norwegian (default), English, and German.
